desc: Toggles pin state of all host grids in open worksets (pin ↔ unpin).
summary: Toggles pin state of all host grids in open worksets (pin ↔ unpin). Linked grids are skipped because they cannot be edited from the host model. Uses Pin.ToggleGridsInOpenWorksets for the toggle logic. Called from ribbon or via AI orchestration.
usecase: User wants to quickly toggle all grid pin states before editing grid positions. User needs to unpin grids that were batch-pinned after setup. User wants to re-pin grids after repositioning.
notfor: Not for unpinning only (use UnpinAllGridsCommand instead). Not for toggling grids in linked models. Not for autonomous AI execution — requires interactive Revit UI context.
precondition: Active document must be open. At least one grid must exist in the model. Worksets containing grids must be open for modification.
postcondition: All host grids on open worksets have their pin state toggled. Previously pinned grids are now unpinned, and vice versa. Linked grids and grids on closed worksets are unchanged.
logictree: check: document.isValid → proceedcheck: grids.count > 0 → proceedaction: toggleGridsInOpenWorksets → report results

outputs.name: ToggledToPinned
outputs.description: Number of grids toggled to pinned state

outputs.name: ToggledToUnpinned
outputs.description: Number of grids toggled to unpinned state

preprompts: Toggling pin state on all host grids...
Switching grid pin states in open worksets...
thinkingsteps: Finding all host grids in open worksets...
Toggling pin state for each grid...
successprompts: Toggled {ToggledToPinned} grids to pinned, {ToggledToUnpinned} to unpinned.
